title: SciQ
description: Evolve a single-file solver independently for each SciQ multiple-choice science question in the local full validation split.
baseline_summary: A placeholder dataset-level solver template that returns the first available answer choice.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher accuracy is better across independently evolved SciQ question runs.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return the best answer string for the current science question.
